title: Bards [More Magic Series]
description: Defeat your enemies and buffs your allies with the power of music!
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required
- AzureLib Armor
- More Runes
- Spell Engine
- More Spell Attributes
- Ranged Weapons API
- Dragonsteel & Star Alloy
### Strongly recommended
- Better Combat - for proper weapon mechanics
- More Jewels - for jewels to boost your strengths
# ✨ Features
This mod one new playable class to the game, to compliment the role play experience.

### Hymns to War , Symphony to Wisdom & Songs to Valor Spell Books

Craft a Spell Binding Table (just don't forget bookshelves around the Spell Binding Table).

To unlock War spells, create the Hymns to War on the Spell Binding Table! 

To unlock Wisdom spells, create the Symphony to Wisdom on the Spell Binding Table! 

To unlock Valor spells, create the Songs to Valor on the Spell Binding Table! 

### Explore the armory

Explore new, craftable, bard equipment, with bonuses to boost spell damage.

![Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6534ccbe448c43da03d3718bfc3c582eff8717e.png)

Bard: new 2 armor sets, Flutes.

# 🔧 Configuration
**Item bonuses:**
- config/bards/item_v3

**Effect bonuses:**
- config/bards/effects
